text:
Every device weighing less than one hundred pounds that (a) has handlebars, a floorboard or a seat that can be stood or sat upon by the operator, and an electric motor, (b) can be powered by the electric motor and/or human power, and

(c) has a maximum speed of no more than twenty miles per hour on a paved level surface when powered solely by the electric motor.
markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 1
#### Article 1. Words & Phrases Defined
##### § 114-E — Electric scooter

Every device weighing less than one hundred pounds that (a) has handlebars, a floorboard or a seat that can be stood or sat upon by the operator, and an electric motor, (b) can be powered by the electric motor and/or human power, and

(c) has a maximum speed of no more than twenty miles per hour on a paved level surface when powered solely by the electric motor.

*Last modified: Apr. 17, 2020*
